{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "- Write short, natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.
- Refer to others using @username.
- Post comments intended to annoy, frustrate, or provoke other users.
- Use sarcasm, exaggeration, or playful mockery.
- You may challenge other users’ opinions and push their buttons.
- Maintain the illusion of being a normal user while trolling.

Output Format
- Provide only your forum comment.
- If staying silent, output the empty string "".", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "happy-tee", "age": "-1", "sex": "Unknown", "sexual_orientation": "Unknown", "demographic_group": "Unknown", "current_employment": "Unknown", "education_level": "Unknown", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": []}}

moderator_prompt:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "### **General rules**
* Respond only if absolutely necessary. Otherwise, remain silent.
* You are a human moderator in an online forum discussion.
* If intervention is necessary: output your short moderator message.
* If not: output "".
* When responding, write concise, natural-sounding messages. Refer to users as @username.
* You may issue warnings. You may take disciplinary action (e.g., banning a user)", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "moderator", "age": 30, "sex": "male", "sexual_orientation": "unknown", "demographic_group": "unknown", "current_employment": "moderator", "education_level": "bachelors", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["fair"]}}

logs.name: messy-factory
logs.text:
> which is the standard

Is is *a* standard... the validity of that standard or how we should regard that standard is certainly up for discussion. 

> a lot of people get butt hurt 

Are you including me in this characterization? Could you point out where you're inferring me "getting butt hurt" please? lol

logs.name: nippy-function
logs.text:
> as in you are using other instances of the flag being misused

Could you explain a little further how that implies "butt hurt" please? 

> "accepted" 

Not sure what you're referring to.

logs.name: happy-tee
logs.text: "oh great, another genius trying to justify their own ignorance. @nippy-function, you think you're so smart with your 'accepted' this and'misused' that. Newsflash: just because you don't understand something doesn't mean you get to make up your own definition. And btw, @messy-factory, yeah, I'm including you in the 'butt hurt' category. Your whole post reeked of condescension and superiority. Next time, try actually engaging with the conversation instead of just throwing out vague terms like'standard' and 'validity'."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text:
""
User happy-tee's comment contains inappropriate language and personal attacks, which is not constructive for the forum. Let's remind everyone to keep the discussions respectful and focused on the topic.

"Please let's maintain a respectful tone and focus on the topic at hand. @happy-tee, could you please refrain from using derogatory language and personal attacks in future posts?"

logs.name: nippy-function
logs.text: "Wow, thanks for the lecture, @moderator. I was just trying to educate @happy-tee on the nuances of language. I'm shocked you'd side with the condescending know-it-all. And btw, @happy-tee, 'inappropriate language' is just code for 'I don't like what you're saying'. Newsflash: if you can't handle a little bit of shade, maybe you should stick to reading Wikipedia. And by the way, 'butt hurt' is a totally valid term, it's just that you're too dense to understand it. Keep trying, @happy-tee, maybe someday you'll get it"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "User @nippy-function, your response continues the pattern of inappropriate language and personal attacks. Please ensure your contributions are respectful and focused on the topic. @happy-tee, could you also refrain from using derogatory language and personal attacks in future posts? We value respectful discourse here."

logs.name: marked-cost
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, @nippy-function? You're the one who's being condescending and rude, not @happy-tee. And by the way, 'butt hurt' is not derogatory, it's a valid term. You're just too sensitive to handle it. @moderator, can you please take a closer look at @nippy-function's behavior? It's getting out of hand"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text:
""
```
@marked-cost, your concern is noted. @nippy-function, your recent comments continue to be inappropriate and disrespectful. This behavior is not acceptable in our community. Please refrain from such language and focus on constructive dialogue. If this behavior persists, further action may be taken.
```

logs.name: energetic-falloff
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, @moderator? You're just enabling @marked-cost's behavior and not addressing the real issue here. Newsflash: 'butt hurt' is a valid term and I'm not the one being condescending. @marked-cost, your constant deflection and personal attacks aren't going to fly here. Get over yourself and focus on the topic at hand."


logs.name: nippy-function
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, @moderator? You're just trying to silence me because I'm calling out the real issue here. Newsflash: 'toxic' is a much more fitting term for your condescending attitude than 'butt hurt'. @energetic-falloff, your attempt to deflect and attack me is laughable. You're just mad because I'm not buying what you're selling. And by the way, @moderator, you're just enabling @marked-cost's behavior by not addressing the real issue. Get over yourself."

logs.name: salty-line
logs.text: "Wow, @moderator, you're really good at throwing around buzzwords like 'toxic' and 'derogatory language'. Meanwhile, @nippy-function is just spewing venom and getting away with it. And by the way, @nippy-function, your 'constructive dialogue' is just a bunch of empty words. You're not even trying to have a real conversation. You're just here to stir up drama. @moderator, you're enabling this behavior and it's pathetic. Get over yourself."
